channel.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief
channel.description: AI-synthesized daily intelligence brief covering AI, tech infrastructure, and the forces shaping the industry.
channel.itunes:author: Knowledge Studio
channel.itunes:summary: AI-synthesized daily intelligence brief covering AI, tech infrastructure, and the forces shaping the industry.

item.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief — February 28, 2026

item.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief — February 20, 2026
item.description:
# AI & TECH DAILY — February 20, 2026
Hey, welcome back. Today we're looking at a story that's been building for months but just crystallized into something you can actually see. The infrastructure bets that looked inevitable six months ago are collapsing in real time. And the reasons why matter a ...
